name: @cpdevtools/test-service-docker
description: Test package: Docker image build + pack-deploy. Exercises the full build → pack → pack-deploy pipeline.

scripts.github.actions.pack: mkdir -p "$ARTIFACT_OUTPUT_DIR" && docker save test-service:latest | gzip > "$ARTIFACT_OUTPUT_DIR/test-service-image.tar.gz" && echo "Saved image to $ARTIFACT_OUTPUT_DIR/test-service-image.tar.gz"

author: CPDevTools
